div.small: Hi . Ask any question about Steamships procedures, prices, or onboarding.

div.div: The assistant answers ONLY from internal documents and cites its sources. Try: "A client wants to ship a 20ft container from Lae to Port Moresby — what do I quote and what documents do I need?"

STAFF mode searches the full corpus (SOPs, price list, policies, contacts). CLIENT mode is limited to the onboarding FAQ, services catalog, and glossary — internal prices and SOPs are hidden by the rag-api visibility filter.
